name: doc-steward
description: A focused documentation stewardship skill for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Keep project docs accurate after meaningful changes without documentation churn.
interface.longDescription: Use Doc Steward to help coding agents keep README files, reference docs, architecture docs, changelogs, ADRs, playbooks, and agent guidance synchronized with verified project changes.
defaultPrompt: Check this change for documentation impact.
Bootstrap concise documentation for this project.
